findings.summary: ESP32 8-channel MOSFET output board (77 components). Correct: all components, nets, AZ1117-3.3 LDO, CP2104 USB-UART, auto-reset circuit, MOSFET switches, BOM. Incorrect: flyback diodes D3-D10 not detected (drain-to-VCC topology missed), regulator input cap C4 falsely flagged as missing. Missed: D1/D2 power OR-ing, R17-R24 gate pulldowns.

correct.description: All 77 components with accurate pin-to-net assignment

incorrect.description: has_flyback_diode=false for Q3-Q10 despite D3-D10 Schottky diodes from drain to VCC
Regulator input cap falsely flagged as missing (C4 1uF is on the input net)

missed.description: D1/D2 Schottky power OR-ing not detected

suggestions: Check flyback diodes from drain to supply rail not just drain-to-source
Fix regulator_caps to detect existing caps on input net
